'''Yang Water Tiger''' is the 39th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 壬 Mizunoe (yang water, the gaia-aligned face of winter), and its branch is 寅 Tora, the [[Tiger (zodiac)|Tiger]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's water generates the branch's wood, a relationship of nourishment.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Metal Ox]] (node 38) and [[Yin Water Rabbit]] (node 40).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Mizunoe (壬)]] — yang water
* '''Branch:''' [[Tiger (zodiac)|Tiger (寅)]] — yang wood
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' winter

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Metal Ox]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Water Rabbit]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q1062922}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
